data.title: Petrobras Highlights R$277.6 Billion Tax and Royalty Contribution in Brazil for 2025
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras ( (PBR) ) has issued an announcement.

Petrobras reported that in 2025 it paid R$277.6 billion in taxes and government take in Brazil, a 3% increase over the prior year, alongside US$448.65 million in taxes abroad and the approval of R$47.5 billion in dividends, of which R$45.2 billion were disbursed. The company said these payments, equivalent to about R$1.1 billion per business day and roughly 7% of Brazil’s total revenue, underscore its status as one of the country’s largest taxpayers and a key source of funding for federal, state and municipal budgets, reinforcing its economic and social relevance as it pursues its strategy as an integrated, diversified energy player.

In 2025 Petrobras’ contributions included R$68.6 billion in royalties and other government take, R$93.3 billion in federal taxes and R$113.8 billion in state taxes, reflecting its heavy exposure to Brazil’s complex multi-level tax system and its role as both taxpayer and tax withholding agent. Management highlighted that robust tax governance, supported by ethics and transparency principles, is central to the company’s risk management and to its ability to sustain large-scale public transfers and shareholder returns, positioning Petrobras as a pivotal intermediary between the oil sector’s wealth generation and public spending in areas such as health, education, infrastructure and security.

The most recent analyst rating on (PBR) stock is a Buy with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras stock, see the PBR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PBR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PBR is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong margins and cash generation, though cyclical and less robust than peak years) and strong technical trend signals despite overbought momentum risk. Valuation is a major positive with a very low P/E and high dividend yield, while the earnings call supports the outlook via operational execution but flags key risks from oil-price exposure (no hedging) and elevated debt/leasing obligations.

To see Spark’s full report on PBR stock, click here.

More about Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras

Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras is Brazil’s state-controlled integrated energy company, operating across exploration and production, refining, distribution and related petroleum and gas activities. With 477 branches in 22 states and 128 municipalities, it is among the main taxpayers in Brazil, playing a central role in the national oil, gas and fuel markets and in public revenue generation.

Average Trading Volume: 25,444,839

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $116.8B

data.title: Pulse Biosciences Launches Thyroid Cancer Feasibility Study
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Pulse Biosciences ( (PLSE) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Pulse Biosciences announced that the first patients were enrolled in a multicenter, first-in-human feasibility study evaluating its nPulse Vybrance Percutaneous Electrode System for treating T1N0M0 papillary thyroid microcarcinoma, a small, slow-growing form of thyroid cancer. Initial procedures were successfully completed at Sarasota Memorial Health Care System in Florida and The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center in Texas, with a total of 30 patients planned across the two sites.

The study, conducted under an Investigational Device Exemption, will assess the safety and effectiveness of the Vybrance System in tumors under 1.5 cm, leveraging nsPFA energy to provide precise, nonthermal ablation while preserving critical surrounding structures. The device, already cleared by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for soft tissue ablation, is partly funded by Pulse Biosciences for this thyroid cancer application, marking an operational step that could broaden its clinical footprint in minimally invasive oncology treatments.

The most recent analyst rating on (PLSE) stock is a Hold with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pulse Biosciences stock, see the PLSE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PLSE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PLSE is a Neutral.

PLSE scores below average primarily due to weak financial performance (minimal revenue, large losses, and elevated cash burn) and limited valuation support (negative P/E, no dividend). Offsetting these are improving longer-term technical positioning (above 50/100/200-day averages) and constructive earnings-call updates around IDE progress, clinical outcomes, and IP expansion, though near-term commercialization and funding needs remain key constraints.

To see Spark’s full report on PLSE stock, click here.

More about Pulse Biosciences

Pulse Biosciences, Inc. is a bioelectric medicine company that develops its proprietary nPulse technology, which delivers nanosecond pulsed field ablation (nsPFA) energy to non-thermally clear cellular tissue while sparing adjacent noncellular structures. The company targets applications including atrial fibrillation and surgical soft tissue ablation, as well as non-cardiac indications through systems like its nPulse Vybrance Percutaneous Electrode System.

Average Trading Volume: 323,797

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.36B

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd. ( (JFBR) ) has provided an announcement.

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd, through its homeland security subsidiary KeepZone AI, is positioning itself as a provider of AI-enabled security ecosystems for government, defense and critical infrastructure clients worldwide. The company’s capabilities span threat detection, counter-drone systems, RF spectrum intelligence, cybersecurity and now secure communications infrastructure.

On March 9, 2026, Jeffs’ Brands announced that KeepZone AI entered a channel partner agreement with TDCOMM Ltd to distribute private LTE and 5G wireless network solutions in Ecuador. The deal broadens KeepZone’s portfolio into secure 4G/5G infrastructure for mission-critical environments such as government campuses, ports, energy facilities, mining operations and border security sites, reinforcing the company’s shift from e-commerce roots into the high-growth homeland security and secure communications market.

Separately, on March 12, 2026, Jeffs’ Brands convened a special general meeting of shareholders that was adjourned by one day due to lack of quorum. The meeting was rescheduled for March 13, 2026, with relaxed quorum conditions on adjournment, a procedural step that may ease passage of agenda items important to the company’s ongoing strategic transition.

More about Jeffs’ Brands Ltd.

Jeffs’ Brands Ltd is a data-driven company that has been expanding into the global homeland security sector via its wholly owned subsidiary, KeepZone AI Inc. The group focuses on AI-driven, multi-layered security ecosystems for governments and critical infrastructure operators, building on expertise in data-driven operations and capitalizing on demand for advanced surveillance and communications solutions.

The latest update is out from Ondas ( (ONDS) ).

On March 12, 2026, Palantir Technologies, Ondas and World View Enterprises announced a strategic partnership to develop an AI-enabled, multi-domain intelligence platform integrating stratospheric balloons, autonomous aerial and ground robots and advanced software. The alliance targets defense, homeland security and critical infrastructure customers with persistent intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance capabilities spanning the stratosphere, air and land.

The partners will fuse World View’s Stratollite high-altitude platforms with Ondas’ unmanned and counter-drone systems, all coordinated by Palantir’s Artificial Intelligence Platform to unify mission planning, production and edge operations. Three core programs—Warp Speed, AI Flight Director and SkyWeaver—are designed to streamline aerospace production, enhance flight operations and push data processing to the edge, positioning Ondas and its partners to scale complex ISR missions and shift the focus from raw data collection to faster, decision-centric intelligence delivery.

data.title: Ultragenyx Announces Positive Phase 3 Results for DTX301
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical ( (RARE) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Ultragenyx reported positive Phase 3 Enh3ance trial results for DTX301, its investigational AAV8 gene therapy for ornithine transcarbamylase deficiency, showing an 18% reduction in 24-hour plasma ammonia levels versus placebo at Week 36 and maintenance of average ammonia exposure within the normal range. Patients on DTX301 rapidly improved ammonia control despite reduced use of ammonia scavenger medications and higher protein intake, reported better symptom and daily living scores than placebo, and experienced fewer hyperammonemic crises and deaths, while safety remained consistent with earlier studies and the program is being advanced within existing spending plans and a goal of profitability in 2027.

The study’s planned second primary endpoint will assess reduction in treatment burden, including medication and dietary restrictions, across treated and placebo-crossover groups through 64 weeks, with data expected in the first half of 2027, potentially positioning DTX301 as a meaningful new option in OTC deficiency care. The company indicated that the conduct of this late-stage program aligns with its February 2026 financial guidance and is being managed to support its target of reaching profitability in 2027, underscoring both clinical and operational progress for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (RARE) stock is a Buy with a $74.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical stock, see the RARE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RARE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RARE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance: large ongoing losses, significant cash burn, and a sharply reduced equity base. Technicals also remain unfavorable with the stock trading below major moving averages and negative MACD. Offsetting these risks, the latest earnings call provided constructive forward guidance on revenue growth and planned cost reductions aimed at reaching profitability in 2027, but execution and regulatory risks remain significant.

To see Spark’s full report on RARE stock, click here.

More about Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical

Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing gene therapies and other treatments for rare metabolic and genetic diseases. Its pipeline includes investigational adeno-associated virus (AAV) gene therapies such as DTX301, which targets patients with ornithine transcarbamylase deficiency who remain symptomatic despite current standard-of-care drugs and strict dietary management.

The latest update is out from CION Investment Corp ( (CION) ).

On March 12, 2026, CION Investment Corporation reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results showing net investment income of $0.35 per share but an overall loss of $0.80 per share, as unrealized mark-to-market declines in certain equity holdings drove a 7.4% drop in net asset value to $13.76. Total investment income fell sharply from the prior quarter, while the company modestly shrank its funded portfolio, slightly increased non-accruals, and stepped up balance-sheet activity with $307.5 million of new unsecured debt issuance, repayment of 2026 notes, ongoing share repurchases, and the declaration and payment of recurring base distributions that underscore its income-generation focus despite near-term portfolio valuation pressure.

CION ended 2025 with $1.14 billion of debt outstanding and a higher net debt-to-equity ratio of 1.44x, while management emphasized the resilience of its predominantly first lien book, improved borrower interest coverage, and intentionally low software exposure as key supports to its risk profile heading into 2026. The company also continued to return capital to shareholders through $5.2 million of fourth-quarter stock buybacks and a $0.36 per share base distribution in December 2025, followed by declared monthly base distributions of $0.10 per share for the first quarter of 2026 and additional baby bond issuance in February 2026 that further extends its unsecured funding profile.

The materials from the event are available on the company’s investor relations website, underscoring its efforts to maintain active communication with the investment community.

data.title: Verano Holdings Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results, Strategic Moves
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Verano Holdings ( (TSE:VRNO) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Verano reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of $207 million, up 2% sequentially but down 5% year-on-year, with gross margin at 51% and adjusted EBITDA of $56 million, while posting a net loss of $183 million due largely to lower impairment charges versus 2024. For full-year 2025, revenue fell 6% to $822 million and net loss narrowed to $258 million, as the company streamlined operations, cut SG&A, and maintained a 28% adjusted EBITDA margin despite softer top-line performance.

Management highlighted achieving top-three market share across all categories, redomiciling from Canada to Nevada to position for potential U.S. capital markets access, settling legacy litigation, and winning a conditional vertical license in Texas ahead of a planned medical expansion. Verano also closed a new $195 million senior secured term loan at an initial 9.5% rate that it characterizes as among the industry’s most favorable, bolstering liquidity and funding measured capex of $41 million in 2025 and a guided $30–50 million range for 2026 aimed at efficiency upgrades and selective retail growth.

The company generated $53 million in operating cash flow in 2025, down from $112 million in 2024, reflecting inventory adjustments and higher tax payments, but continued to invest in automation, CPG technology, and marketing to support brand strength amid price compression and intensified competition. With existing or pending operations in Florida, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Texas, Verano argues it is well-positioned to benefit from potential U.S. federal rescheduling of cannabis and state-level medical program expansion in what it expects could be a pivotal 2026 for the sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:VRNO) stock is a Hold with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Verano Holdings stock, see the TSE:VRNO Stock Forecast page.

On March 9, 2026, Aveanna subsidiary Pediatric Services of America, LLC agreed to acquire all membership interests of Family First Holding, LLC, a multi-state pediatric home care provider operating as Family First Homecare, for $175.5 million in cash, subject to customary adjustments. data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Gogoro ( (GGR) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 12, 2026, Gogoro reported it had signed a Share Purchase Agreement on March 11, 2026 with its largest shareholder, Gold Sino Assets Limited, for a new equity investment of about US$16.7 million. Under the deal, Gold Sino will subscribe to 5.3 million newly issued ordinary shares at US$3.15 per share, a 10% discount to Gogoro’s 30-day volume-weighted average price as of March 6, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions including Nasdaq clearance.

The transaction, expected to close on or before March 31, 2026, will increase Gold Sino’s ownership from 31.4% to roughly 49% of Gogoro’s outstanding shares, further consolidating the influence of its largest shareholder. The investment, which is the first equity funding secured under a prior undertaking to Gogoro’s lenders, strengthens the company’s capital base as it navigates growth, market risks in its core Asian geographies and ongoing expansion of its battery-swapping mobility platform.

The most recent analyst rating on (GGR) stock is a Hold with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gogoro stock, see the GGR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GGR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GGR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial fundamentals—ongoing net losses, negative free cash flow, and reduced balance-sheet flexibility versus debt—despite clear 2025 operating improvements. The earnings call supports a credible profitability roadmap and near-term funding, while technicals are bullish but overbought, and valuation signals remain constrained by losses and no dividend support.

More about Gogoro

Gogoro Inc., founded in 2011 and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker GGR, is a global technology company focused on battery-swapping ecosystems that support sustainable urban mobility. It operates the Gogoro Network, serving nearly 700,000 riders with more than 800 million battery swaps completed across over 2,700 GoStation locations, and has been widely recognized for innovation in climate and mobility technology.

data.title: Solid Biosciences Reports Encouraging Phase 1/2 Duchenne Data
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Solid Biosciences ( (SLDB) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 11, 2026, Solid Biosciences reported positive interim data from its first-in-human Phase 1/2 INSPIRE DUCHENNE trial of SGT-003 in 40 pediatric patients with Duchenne muscular dystrophy, based on a February 23, 2026 data cutoff. The treatment was generally well tolerated under a steroid-only immunomodulation regimen across 15 sites in the U.S., Canada, Italy and the U.K., with dosing continuing.

Biopsies from 20 participants at Day 90 and three at Day 360 showed robust microdystrophin transduction and expression, along with restored beta-sarcoglycan and nNOS activity, suggesting reconstitution of critical components of the dystrophin-associated protein complex. A marked reduction in embryonic myosin heavy chain-positive fibers and decreases in multiple serum muscle damage biomarkers indicated improved muscle integrity and potential interruption of the chronic degeneration-regeneration cycle.

Cardiac assessments, initially planned for safety, showed stabilization to improvement in left ventricular ejection fraction, particularly in participants who began with low-normal systolic function, addressing a key cause of morbidity and mortality in Duchenne. Solid Biosciences also confirmed it has reached agreement with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration on the design of its Phase 3 IMPACT DUCHENNE trial of SGT-003, with screening underway and first dosing expected in the first quarter of 2026, underscoring a clear regulatory and clinical path that could strengthen the company’s position in the competitive Duchenne gene therapy landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLDB) stock is a Buy with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Solid Biosciences stock, see the SLDB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLDB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLDB is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak fundamentals—zero TTM revenue, widening losses, and significant ongoing cash burn—despite a relatively low-debt balance sheet. Technicals are moderately supportive with neutral-to-positive momentum, but valuation remains difficult to justify on earnings due to the negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on SLDB stock, click here.

More about Solid Biosciences

Solid Biosciences Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing gene therapies for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, a rare, progressive neuromuscular disease affecting children. Its lead investigational product, SGT-003, is a microdystrophin gene therapy administered as a one-time intravenous infusion, targeting restoration of key dystrophin-associated protein complex functions in pediatric patients.

Average Trading Volume: 1,273,833

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $601.1M
